name: C2xSetTokenData
title: C2xSetTokenData
syntax: long C2xSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long length, char data[] );
description: This function sets the data or a part of data of a token.
It does not resize the token. Use C2xResizeToken to change the length.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket
